гҖҖгҖҖThis Animal Planet documentary follows wildlife expert Dave Salmoni as he ventures into the wilds of Africa on what seems like an impossible mission: to teach a pride of dangerously aggressive lions to live in harmony with human beings. Risking his own life, Salmoni attempts to win the trust of every lion -- from the alpha male down to the rambunctious young cubs -- as he tries...
